audit.reason: The Luhn algorithm is explicitly required by the README.
The README explicitly supports provider-specific validation.
The README specifies that invalid providers should result in an error.
The implementation sanitizes input before validation, which aligns with expected behavior.
The README supports validation against all card provider patterns when no provider is specified.
The README supports provider-specific validation, and early returns are consistent with this behavior.
The group duplicates the behavior already covered by 'Global pattern matching' and does not add new requirement-supported cases.
The group duplicates the behavior already covered by 'Invalid provider error handling' and does not add new requirement-supported cases.
